tasks.subject: Scaffold Vite + React + TailwindCSS in dashboard package
tasks.description: Install missing runtime and dev dependencies (react-router-dom, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, recharts) and create the Tailwind config + src/index.css with shadcn CSS variables. The dashboard package already has a minimal Vite + React scaffold; extend it to match the Phase 6 spec.

acceptanceCriteria: tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, react-router-dom, recharts are in devDependencies/dependencies
tailwind.config.js exports darkMode class config with shadcn color tokens
src/index.css contains @tailwind directives and :root/.dark CSS variables

tasks.subject: Install shadcn/ui components and utils
tasks.description: Add the shadcn/ui utility libraries (class-variance-authority, clsx, tailwind-merge, tailwindcss-animate, lucide-react) and create src/lib/utils.ts plus the required shadcn/ui component files under packages/dashboard/src/components/ui/.

acceptanceCriteria: cn() helper exists in src/lib/utils.ts
All required shadcn/ui components compile without TypeScript errors
Components use Tailwind utility classes and CSS variable tokens

tasks.subject: Create API client and useSSE hook (TDD)
tasks.description: Write the failing test first in packages/dashboard/src/api/client.test.ts, then implement packages/dashboard/src/api/client.ts with listJobs, getJob, controlJob, decideApproval, and a useSSE hook for live events. Follow the Phase 6 spec for types and endpoints.

acceptanceCriteria: client.test.ts has a failing test before implementation is added
All four API client tests pass
Types mirror the API response shapes (Job, JobStep, JobEvent, Approval, JobDetail)

tasks.subject: Create shared dashboard components
tasks.description: Create reusable dashboard components: JobStatusBadge, StatCard, ApprovalCard, and EventRow under packages/dashboard/src/components/. They must follow the UI non-negotiable rules (shadcn only, Tailwind only, dark mode aware, semantic tokens).

acceptanceCriteria: JobStatusBadge uses the STATUS_VARIANT map
StatCard accepts icon, value, title, description
ApprovalCard calls decideApproval and shows error Alert
EventRow renders timestamp, level badge, type, message

tasks.subject: Create app shell and router
tasks.description:
Implement the application layout (AppShell with sidebar navigation) and router setup (App.tsx, main.tsx). Ensure the root HTML includes dark mode class and the app routes to Overview, Jobs, JobDetail, and Config pages.

Note: minimal page stubs were created so App.tsx could typecheck; they are replaced in task #6.

acceptanceCriteria: BrowserRouter wraps AppShell and Routes
AppShell renders sidebar nav with active-state styling
index.html has class="dark" on the html element

tasks.subject: Implement dashboard pages
tasks.description: Build the four page components: Overview (mock metrics + Recharts charts), Jobs (list table with controls), JobDetail (tabs, timeline, events, raw, approvals), and Config (read-only tables for templates, credentials, mappings).

acceptanceCriteria: Overview renders stat cards, LineChart, PieChart, recent activity, and mock-data badge
Jobs table shows status badges, MR links, and stop/pause/resume actions
JobDetail has Tabs for Timeline/Events/Raw and uses SSE for live events
Config page shows agent templates, redacted credentials, and repo mappings

tasks.subject: Configure Vite with API proxy
tasks.description: Update packages/dashboard/vite.config.ts to add the @ alias pointing to src and proxy /jobs, /webhooks, /approvals, /agent-templates, /credentials, /repo-mappings to the API service at http://localhost:3000.

acceptanceCriteria: @ alias resolves to src
All API routes are proxied to localhost:3000
Build output directory is dist with emptyOutDir true

tasks.subject: Build dashboard and run tests
tasks.description: Run the dashboard test suite and production build. Fix any TypeScript or build errors before marking the phase complete.

acceptanceCriteria: pnpm --filter @jigit/dashboard test passes
pnpm --filter @jigit/dashboard build produces static assets in dist/
No TypeScript errors in the dashboard package

tasks.subject: Commit dashboard phase work
tasks.description: Stage the dashboard package changes and commit with a scoped message and Co-Authored-By trailer.

acceptanceCriteria: All dashboard changes are staged by name (not git add -A)
Commit message follows conventional commits and includes Co-Authored-By
